description: Detects TOCTOU (time-of-check time-of-use) race conditions in C: access() or stat() followed by open() on the same path. Simplified from Rust: flags all call_expression nodes (cannot detect check-then-use pairs across statements without multi-match support). Simplified per D-07: match access()/stat() calls broadly.

flag.message: Function call detected -- verify access(), stat(), lstat() are not followed by open()/fopen() on the same path (TOCTOU race condition); use O_NOFOLLOW or atomic operations instead
